Motion To Withdraw As Attorney Of Record
Off Calendar May-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barrett R. Baskin, Esq. Of BRODSKY, BASKIN & MILLER, (415) 543-1111, appeared as moving party moving to withdraw as attorney of record for plaintiff Vincent Nieva. Marc T. Cefalu, Esq., of COX, WOOTTON, GRIFFIN, HANSEN & POULOS, appeared on behalf of defendant and non-opposing party American Ship Management. Mr. Nieve did not appear.

There being no appearance in opposition to Mr. Baskin's motion to withdraw as attorney of record for Vincent Nieva, the Court granted the motion. Counsel to prepare order. Order will be effective upon service upon the client. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne CSR#7855

For Continuance Of Trial Date; P&A; Decl Of Barrett R Baskin
